entries.note: The top-level prompt shell is removed from the public root. Repo-owned proof surfaces now reach it through direct imports of `src/internal/prompt_support.zig` only.
The top-level prompt-mode enum is removed from the public root. Repo-owned proof surfaces now reach it through direct imports of `src/internal/prompt_support.zig` only.

The top-level zero-or-one-resume decision type is removed from the public root. Public choice code uses `shift.effect.choice.Decision`; repo-owned prompt-protocol proofs use direct imports of `src/internal/prompt_support.zig:ResumeOrReturn`.
ControlError remains part of the public lowered-first root surface.
ResetError remains part of the public lowered-first root surface.
Runtime remains the public lowered-first runtime handle.
Error remains the public lowered-first runtime error surface.
ordinary is the public experimental source-backed lowering surface for the restricted ordinary-Zig wave-one subset.
The explicit program frontend is removed from the public root. Repo-owned proof surfaces now reach it through direct imports of `src/internal/prompt_support.zig:frontend` only.
The top-level reset helper is removed from the public root. Repo-owned prompt-protocol proofs now use direct imports of `src/internal/prompt_support.zig:run` instead.
